title: ERC-8004: Trustless Agents
quote: This protocol proposes to use blockchains to discover, choose, and interact with agents across organizational boundaries without pre-existing trust, thus enabling open-ended agent economies.

title: ERC-8004: Trustless Agents with Reputation, Validation & Identity
quote: ERC-8004 establishes three lightweight on-chain registries for Identity, Reputation, and Validation that let agents discover each other, build verifiable reputations, and collaborate securely.

title: What Is ERC-8004? Inside Ethereum's Proposed Standard for Trustless AI Agents
quote: ERC-8004 addresses the trust gap between autonomous agents with on-chain registries that enable discovery, reputation-building, and verification.

title: ERC-8004 Explained: Ethereum's AI Agent Standard Guide 2025
quote: The Identity Registry provides portable agent identifiers using ERC-721, the Reputation Registry enables standardized feedback and rating collection, and the Validation Registry supports cryptographic and economic verification of agent work.

title: Ethereum's ERC-8004 aims to put identity and trust behind AI agents
quote: ERC-8004 gives AI agents a verifiable on-chain identity, a reputation system, and a mechanism for independent task validation; co-authored by contributors from MetaMask, the Ethereum Foundation, Google, and Coinbase.

title: ERC-8004: Trustless Agents (Ethereum Magicians discussion)
quote: Critiques surfaced in-thread: no way for arbitrary smart contracts to read validation responses (spengrah); domain-bound identity prevents multi-agent hosting (pcarranzav); single-score aggregation can facilitate monopolistic reputation (daniel-ospina). Authors defend off-chain storage: 'Single feedback or validation won't be used to decide trust. People will always aggregate entries.'

title: Ethereum gears up for ERC-8004 rollout on mainnet this week
quote: Ethereum announced ERC-8004 mainnet go-live as early as January 29, 2026. Ethereum's official post said 'ERC-8004 allows AI agents to interact across organizations ensuring credibility travels everywhere.'

title: ERC-8004 Mainnet Launch: What This Agent Protocol Actually Does
quote: Within the first month of mainnet, more than 45,000 AI agents had registered across multiple blockchains according to 8004 Scan. The standard has received backing from ENS, EigenLayer, The Graph, and Taiko.

title: erc-8004/erc-8004-contracts — Registry contracts
quote: Repository implements ERC-8004 (Trustless Agents): upgradeable IdentityRegistry, ReputationRegistry, and ValidationRegistry contracts under CC0 - Public Domain. Tested with Hardhat. Deployed across 30+ EVM networks including Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, Polygon, Optimism, BNB Chain.

title: ERC-8004 'Agents' Standard Nears Mainnet as Ethereum Teases Rollout
quote: ERC-8004 is an Ethereum standard that gives AI agents a verifiable on-chain identity, a reputation system, and a mechanism for independent task validation; mainnet launch planned for January 29, 2026.

title: Announcing Agent Payments Protocol (AP2)
quote: AP2 was developed by Google with leading payments and technology companies to securely initiate and transact agent-led payments across platforms; A2A allowed agents to talk, AP2 lets them transact.

title: Welcome to x402
quote: x402 is an open payments protocol named after the HTTP 402 Payment Required status code, launched by Coinbase in May 2025 to enable machine-to-machine stablecoin payments.

title: ERC-8004: a practical explainer for trustless agents
quote: Reputation Registry standardizes client feedback: bounded score, optional tags, URI-linked reports, KECCAK-256 hashes, with server-issued signatures preventing spam. 'Pre-authorized feedback reduces spam, but many identities can still exist.' 'Economics — collateral, rewards, penalties — are not specified.'

title: Trustless Agents — with zkML
quote: JOLT-Atlas is a specialized zkVM for ML inference that plugs into ERC-8004 validation: agent runs inference, generates ZK proof, validator contract verifies on-chain, ValidationResponse records result. Small models practical today; large LLMs still minutes.

title: ERC-8004: Infrastructure for Autonomous AI Agents
quote: ERC-8004 does not specify economic incentives for validators; security depends on composing higher-level protocols. Capability verification is not provided by registration alone — trust signals depend on validators that may themselves need to be trusted or staked.

title: BNB Chain Backs ERC-8004 for On-chain AI Identities
quote: BNB Chain deployed ERC-8004 on both BSC mainnet and testnet, positioning itself as 'an early hub for agent systems that require low fees and fast execution.' Scroll highlighted the standard's cross-chain design for agent portability. Over 24,000 agent identities tracked on Ethereum-based deployments at time of writing.

title: awesome-erc8004 — curated list of ERC-8004 resources
quote: Curated list of explainers, reference implementations, SDKs, indexers, and use-case demos for ERC-8004.

title: ERC-8004 Gives AI Agents Identity. RedStone and Credora Power Them with Data and Risk Intelligence
quote: RedStone and Credora are shipping data-feed and risk-intelligence integrations that plug into ERC-8004 validators and reputation tags, targeting DeFi agent use cases.
